humanReview.author: engineering_vertical_slice
humanReview.intent: Gentle first success: two guided moves complete two triples.

tutorialCopy.headline: Make a match
tutorialCopy.body: Drag matching products together to clear a shelf.

humanReview.author: studio-curriculum
humanReview.intent: Reinforce the very first lesson: two independent triples of two SKUs, no guided hint. Confirms the player can find and complete a match alone.

humanReview.author: studio-curriculum
humanReview.intent: Teach empty-space management: every full shelf blocks itself, so the only free cells are one empty shelf the player must use to stage the odd product before completing each triple.

tutorialCopy.headline: Make room
tutorialCopy.body: Use the empty shelf to stage a product and free up space.

humanReview.author: studio-curriculum
humanReview.intent: Introduce hidden products: clearing the front triple reveals two new products tucked behind it, which the player must then match. Exactly one new mental model on top of the staging learned in level 3.

tutorialCopy.headline: Hidden products
tutorialCopy.body: Clear the front shelf to reveal what's hidden behind it.

humanReview.author: studio-curriculum
humanReview.intent: Introduce mystery bags: a product wrapped in a bag must be moved to reveal it before its shelf can clear. Exactly one new model on top of hidden products.

tutorialCopy.headline: Mystery bags
tutorialCopy.body: Move a mystery bag to open it, then match what's inside.

humanReview.author: studio-curriculum
humanReview.intent: Introduce the countdown timer on a board the player already cleared in level 2, with generous time. The new model is time pressure itself, not added complexity.

tutorialCopy.headline: Beat the clock
tutorialCopy.body: Clear the shelves before time runs out.

humanReview.author: studio-curriculum
humanReview.intent: Combine a hidden reveal with empty-space staging at higher density. No new model — a confidence-building ramp using three SKUs.

tutorialCopy.headline: Plan ahead
tutorialCopy.body: Use your space to stage, then clear to reveal.

humanReview.author: studio-curriculum
humanReview.intent: Layer two learned obstacles at once — a mystery bag on the key product and a hidden reveal behind the first clear. The first real planning step-up.

tutorialCopy.headline: Bagged & hidden
tutorialCopy.body: Open the bag, then finish the hidden set.

humanReview.author: studio-curriculum
humanReview.intent: Bring the timer back over a genuine three-SKU staging sort (the level-3 lesson scaled up). Tests planning under pressure with one spare shelf.

tutorialCopy.headline: Under pressure
tutorialCopy.body: Sort fast - but keep one shelf free for staging.

humanReview.author: studio-curriculum
humanReview.intent: Graduation: one board that uses every taught model - staging, a hidden reveal, a mystery bag and four SKUs - against a generous clock. The payoff level that proves the player learned the system.

tutorialCopy.headline: Closing time
tutorialCopy.body: Use everything: space, bags, hidden products, and the clock.

humanReview.author: studio-curriculum
humanReview.intent: Four SKUs to sort with light staging - move the odd product off a shelf to complete it. No new model, more to track.

tutorialCopy.headline: Stock up
tutorialCopy.body: Four products now - watch your staging space.

humanReview.author: studio-curriculum
humanReview.intent: A mystery bag under a countdown: open the bag and finish before time runs out. Combines the bag and timer models.

tutorialCopy.headline: Rush hour
tutorialCopy.body: A bag and a clock - open it fast.

humanReview.author: studio-curriculum
humanReview.intent: Four SKUs with a hidden reveal against the clock - clear the front to find what's behind, then finish before time runs out.

tutorialCopy.headline: Warehouse
tutorialCopy.body: Five products. Stay calm and stage.

humanReview.author: studio-curriculum
humanReview.intent: Bag, hidden reveal and staging together against a tight clock - everything learned so far, under pressure.

tutorialCopy.headline: Last call
tutorialCopy.body: Everything at once, against the clock.

humanReview.author: studio-curriculum
humanReview.intent: The grand finale: four SKUs, a mystery bag and a hidden reveal against a generous clock. The capstone that proves mastery of the whole system.

tutorialCopy.headline: Grand opening
tutorialCopy.body: The full set - show what you've learned.
